Hello, Sergio. This is Beatriz from internal audit, with a short summary before you read the full report. The desk's controls were reviewed last week, and two deficiencies were found. A limit was breached in March, and the breach was not disclosed to the committee on the same day. The monthly statement was also submitted late twice. A remediation plan is now required, and it must be approved by the committee before the next quarter. The report will be submitted to the regulator, so please make sure your comments are added by Friday. Thank you.

Hi Sergio, it is Paulo from the credit desk. A quick note on the audit. I have read the draft, and the findings look fair to me. The late statement was already fixed, and the new control was tested yesterday. For the limit breach, a remediation plan is being written now, and it will be reviewed on Monday. One thing: the minutes of the March meeting were not attached, so they must be added before the report is submitted. If the plan is approved, the case will be closed without a penalty. Can you check the minutes before lunch? Thanks.

First, the desk's controls were examined by the internal audit team. Two deficiencies were identified: a late statement and an undisclosed limit breach. A remediation plan was then prepared by the desk and approved by the committee. Next, the report was submitted to the regulator, and the minutes of the meeting were enclosed. Finally, the actions were completed on time, so no penalty was applied.
